# Azeer

Azeer unifies WhatsApp, Voice, SMS, email and social into a single AI-assisted workspace for customer conversations across GCC and MENA.

## What Azeer does

Azeer is a WhatsApp-led revenue and operations orchestration platform. It helps clinics reduce no-shows, e-commerce brands recover abandoned carts, and support teams resolve tickets faster — all from one inbox.

## Verticals

- Healthcare: clinics, polyclinics, dental groups (GCC/MENA)
- E-commerce: Salla and Zid merchants, D2C brands (KSA/GCC)
- Plus: real estate, financial services, education, automotive, hospitality

## Key pages

- /pricing — transparent tier-based pricing
- /blog — playbooks, case studies, industry insights

## Contact

- Demo: https://azeer.io/demo
- Sales: hello@azeer.io
